name: transcript-to-social
description: Convert audio/video files and transcripts into social media posts via AssemblyAI

plugins.name: transcript-to-social
plugins.description: Full pipeline from audio/video files to Twitter/X threads, LinkedIn posts, and Bluesky threads. Uses AssemblyAI for transcription. Supports .mp3, .mp4, .mov, .wav, YouTube URLs, and transcript files.
